title: Pretty Ladies
writer: Adela Rogers St. Johns, Alice D.G. Miller, Joseph Farnham
actors: Zasu Pitts, Tom Moore, Ann Pennington
plot: Comedienne Maggie falls for musician Al Cassidy. They get married, Al becomes a songwriter and Maggie a housewife. Al is hired to write a number for one of the Follies' most beautiful stars and falls for her. Complications ensue.
